# Sidqly Public Website Summary

Official Domain: https://sidqly.com
Tagline: Verified giving. Protected dignity. Clear impact.
Positioning: A premium Islamic operating platform for verified giving, manual payment review, proof approval, dignity-safe charity support, Qurbani, Ramadan, Zakat, Sadaqah, vendors, volunteers, corporate CSR/Zakat, receipts, certificates, and professional reports.

- Contact: team@sidqly.com
